title: vitex incisa var. multifida
intro: Vitex incisa var. multifida, also known as the small-leaf chaste tree or Japanese chaste tree, is a variety of the Vitex incisa species, a flowering plant native to eastern Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to balance hormones and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS. The leaves and flowers of Vitex incisa var. multifida have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, and are also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
